title: propertyScan1D operation
description: One-dimensional property sweep: varies one state variable (T, P or a mole fraction) over n evenly-spaced points and evaluates the requested properties at each. Writes one CSV row per point.

vary.title: Scan axis
vary.description: Variable to sweep, its limits and the number of points (linearly spaced).

state.title: Held state
state.description: The (T, P, composition) values held fixed (all but the swept variable).

properties.title: Properties to evaluate
properties.description: Properties to compute at each point and write to the CSV (e.g. Psat_<comp>, T_bubble, gamma_<comp>, Cp_ig, Z, v_molar, H_real, S_real).

file.title: CSV filename relative to the case
